summary: Canvas Go board with correct intersection-based stone placement, turn alternation, occupied-point rejection, and suicide prevention, but only the center hoshi renders visibly, the four corner hoshi positions lack any contrast, and no capture evidence appears across all test sequences.
evidence_highlights: Turn alternation confirmed every move via status text and ~2026-pixel canvas diffs per click
Occupied-point rejection confirmed: re-click on P00 produces zero pixel change and no turn advance
Suicide prevention demonstrated: White's attempt at corner P00 (both neighbors Black) produces zero change and no turn advance
Three functional controls present (Undo, Pass, New Game) with working reset confirmed by zero diff after New Game
evidence_gaps: Capture probe shows brightness_delta=0 at P11 after surrounding sequence; no stone removal observed in any scenario
P22, P26, P62, P66 (corner hoshi positions) all show zero contrast with adjacent board pixels; only center P44 renders as a visible dark dot
Capture counts remain Black:0 White:0 throughout all scenarios, suggesting capture counting is absent or non-functional
